top_signals.title: Indonesia's nutrition agency chief arrested in corruption probe
Google hit with UK-first AI crackdown over publisher content
top_signals.summary: Google will be forced to give publishers greater control over how their content is used in AI-generated search results after the Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) unveiled what it described as a “world-first” intervention aimed at re-balancing power between Big Tech and content creators. The move comes as publishers increasingly complain that Google’s AI Overviews [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Billionaire Labour backer John Caudwell: I was misled by ‘disastrous’ Starmer
top_signals.summary: Billionaire John Caudwell has said he was “misled” by Starmer’s party and revealed that he hopes to once again back the Tories at the next election. The entrepreneur and philanthropist said there is “no chance” of him voting Labour at the next election, which he says the government is bound to lose. Labour attempted to [...]
